name: Priya Nair
summary: Recent computer science graduate with hands-on internship experience in backend development and a strong foundation in Python and cloud technologies. Eager to contribute to scalable product teams.

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Built 3 new REST API endpoints in Django reducing frontend load time by 18% for the reporting module.
Wrote unit tests achieving 74% code coverage for the billing service.
Collaborated with 2 senior engineers to migrate legacy MySQL queries to PostgreSQL, cutting query execution time by 30%.

experience.title: Junior Backend Developer
bullets: Maintaining and extending internal analytics dashboard used by 12 enterprise clients.
Resolved 40+ production bugs since joining full-time, reducing open P2 ticket count by 55%.
Introduced pre-commit linting hooks that cut code review cycles from 3 rounds to 1.5 on average.

achievements: Best Intern Project Award — Konnect Systems Q1 2023
Published technical blog post on Django ORM optimization with 4,200 views on Medium
